headline: Modesto Residents Will Gain Access to More Affordable Homes Due to $4 Million Health Net Investment
summary: Health Net, one of California's most experienced Medi-Cal managed care health plans and company of Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC), announced a $4 million grant award to Self-Help Enterprises to support the development of Morris Village, a new 45-unit affordable housing community located in Modesto, California.
